BatchReleaseInstances.instanceIds: List of instance IDs, up to 100 elements
BatchReleaseInstances.relatedReleaseFlag: Whether to also release pay-as-you-go EIPs (EIPs in shared bandwidth are automatically unbound and not eligible) and pay-as-you-go data disks attached to the instances at release time; deleteCdsSnapshotFlag is only effective when this field is true
BatchReleaseInstances.deleteCdsSnapshotFlag: Whether to delete cloud disk snapshots upon release
BatchReleaseInstances.bccRecycleFlag: Whether to move the instance to the recycle bin upon release
BatchReleaseInstances.deleteRelatedEnisFlag: Whether to delete associated ENIs upon instance release
